title: mandevilla oaxacensis
intro: Mandevilla oaxacensis, also known as the Mexican mandevilla or Oaxacan mandevilla, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to the presence of alkaloids such as vindoline and ajmalicine. The health benefits of Mandevilla oaxacensis include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its antiseptic properties, which can aid in wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, decoctions, or as a tincture, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
